1.0.0.en: Initial release: pair the SwannOne Key Fob (SWO-KEF1PA) directly to Homey and use its Home, Sleep, Away and Panic buttons in flows.

1.0.1.en: Use the real device photo/icon design and add App Store product images.

1.0.2.en: Use the real device photo as the app/driver icon.

1.0.3.en: Use the real device photo (transparent background) as the app/driver icon.
